trigger_reason: The agent treats investigations as a 'writing task' rather than a 'forensic verification task,' prioritizing high-level MITRE synthesis over raw telemetry extraction and objective evidence validation.
improvements: Mandate 'Telemetry Provenance': Any 'negative' assertion (e.g., no lateral movement) must be coupled with an Evidence Object ID (EOID) referencing the specific log source and duration.

Implement a 'Memory Analysis Failure' flag: If a memory dump cannot be retrieved, the report must explicitly classify findings as 'Limited' rather than 'Negative', triggering a mandatory human-in-the-loop review.

checklist.note: Mandatory cross-reference against previous INV-IDs; if no history exists, must document as 'First observed event'.
Must include file hashes, process command lines, and registry paths; missing artifacts must trigger a 'Partial Analysis' warning.
Explicitly document [Telemetry Source] + [Query Parameters] + [Start/End Time] for every 'Not found' assertion.
Include enrichment: ASN reputation, geo-location, and risk-profile delta (Source vs Baseline) for all external IPs.
Chronological sequence using ISO 8601 linked to Evidence Object IDs (EOIDs) to ensure traceability of every narrative event.
